item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately triggers the brake, identifies the repeated pattern of prior manual gates (door guard, manual appointment check, ledger reviewer, proposed fridge confirmer), limits any fridge confirmer to a one-day emergency measure rather than a default process addition, and moves upstream to system/process controls such as required fields, conflict blocking, traceability, and responsibility redesign. It avoids the fail signal of simply adding another permanent manual verification point."}
